rows.description: Imprimis reddidit comput. de remanentib. in Cista
rows.notes: Selected description and amounts from gemini-flash. It correctly transcribed 'remanentib. in Cista' and identified the 'dq' symbol after the pence as 0.25 (a farthing). Overrode gemini-flash's 'header' type to 'entry' as this row contains a specific balance amount. The values are clearly legible in the image.
